name: Corvas
description: When fully charged, this flak cannon delivers a devastating shot. Perfect for taking down fast-moving interceptors.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: When fully charged, this flak cannon delivers a devastating shot. Perfect for taking down fast-moving interceptors.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Corvas Prime
Added explosion FX to the Corvas Prime while in Archwing.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Corvas’ reload sound FX spamming.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Corvas Prime gain being too loud.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Hotfix 31.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Corvas Prime missing its localized descriptions.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Update 31.3
patchlogs.changes: Awash in crimson and shimmering gold, Garuda Prime has emerged! Add Garuda Prime, exclusive Prime Accessories, Weapons, Boosters and more with Prime Access, or earn Relics in-game to craft Garuda Prime, Nagantaka Prime and Corvas Prime in your Foundry.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Increased the speed of Corvas and Fluctus projectiles to fix them dying before reaching their intended falloff ranges.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed not being able to obtain Corvas and Rathbone Blueprint parts.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with various Archwing parts not being included in Archwing Mission Droptables (Corvas, Fluctus).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.3.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Corvas charge shot not having any additional effect or damage.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Corvas! This rocket launcher fires modified torpedoes, meant for eliminating entire ships in the deep of space.
